review.description: Review current changes for defects and regressions.
review.template: Review the current changes with a code-review mindset. Prioritize bugs, behavioral regressions, security risks, and missing tests. Return findings first with file and line references.

plan-change.description: Create a concise implementation plan before editing.
plan-change.template: Analyze the requested change and produce a concise implementation plan. Include assumptions, likely files to touch, verification steps, and risks. Do not edit files.

checkpoint.template: Create a concise Markdown checkpoint under .opencode-context/sessions/ using the filename format YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS_short-slug.md. Include goal, current status, completed work, next steps, open questions, important files, commands run, and risks/notes. Keep it as a checkpoint, not a full transcript.

handoff.description: Write a handoff note for continuing work later.
handoff.template: Create a Markdown handoff note under .opencode-context/sessions/ using the filename format YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS_short-slug.md. Prioritize what another session needs to continue safely: current goal, state, important decisions, unresolved questions, exact next actions, important files, and commands already run.

decision.description: Record an architectural or harness decision.
decision.template: Create a concise decision record under .opencode-context/decisions/ using the next 3-digit sequence number and a short kebab-case title. Include context, decision, rationale, alternatives considered, consequences, and follow-up verification.
